title: In era of AI, deepfake, credibility crisis looms largest: Scindia on challenges for journalism
description: New Delhi, May 30 (PTI) Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia on Saturday said press faced censorship and scarce resources during the colonial era, but challenges for journalism are different in today’s era of artificial intelligence and deepfake technology, while the biggest crisis is that of credibility. In his address at an event hosted here to mark […]

title: Digital payments, mobile economy have significant room for expansion; no slowdown in transaction growth: Paytm CEO

title: Magnificent humanity challenged by the digital revolution
description: THE strong and clear challenge posed by Pope Leo XIV in his first encyclical, “Magnifica Humanitas (Magnificent Humanity),” is declaring the sacred value of every human life. It’s a strong statement of moral value that asserts the dignity and rights of every person. It comes at a time when people, especially women and children, are being deprived of their humanity and treated as objects to be exploited and abused, their rights eroded or denied. Human lives are damaged almost beyond repair by a new kind of tyrant. Not the human one that maims and kills, but a powerful, electronic one that has begun invading the mobile phones — and by extension, the hearts and minds — of thousands of children and other vulnerable people. It is called artificial intelligence (AI).
content: THE strong and clear challenge posed by Pope Leo XIV in his first encyclical, “Magnifica Humanitas (Magnificent Humanity),” is declaring the sacred value of every human life. It’s a strong statement of moral value that asserts the dignity and rights ... [6605 chars]

title: The pope should have gone further on AI
description: BOSTON, Massachusetts — Artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping how we communicate, access information and work, how income and status are distributed, and even how we wage war. Yet the public conversation remains narrowly focused on the competition between AI labs or on abstract debates about the technology’s capabilities. Almost no one is asking what purpose AI ought to serve, or whether our current mindset, institutions, and control mechanisms are capable of steering the technology toward broad-based improvements in human welfare.

title: Calling Doctor GPT: AI responses to health care queries are nearly 76% accurate
description: Artificial intelligence (AI)-powered chatbots respond to everyday health-related questions from general users with nearly 76% accuracy, which raises concerns about their trustworthiness in real-world client-facing applications, according to a new study led by Penn State researchers.
